description_long: This is a full-sized axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle and a heavy, wedge-shaped metal head. The head is painted a vivid red with a black edge, indicating a protective or decorative coating, and has a broad, flat poll opposite the cutting edge. The handle is made of natural wood, showing a smooth finish with visible grain and a gentle ergonomic curve for improved grip and swing control. The blade is single-edged, wide, and tapers to a sharp point, suitable for chopping wood or similar tasks. The mounting of the head to the handle appears traditional, with the head fitted securely onto the handle's end. No visible brand markings or labels are present on the axe.
description: A full-sized axe with a curved wooden handle and a red-and-black wedge-shaped metal head, designed for chopping tasks. The handle is smooth and ergonomic, while the blade is single-edged and robust.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved wooden handle and the red-and-black wedge-shaped axe head.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow profile of the axe head and the handle's end, emphasizing the blade's sharp edge.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the handle's curve and the other side of the axe head.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting the poll of the axe head and the handle's attachment point.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a smooth finish, oval cross-section, ergonomic grip, and no additional grip features.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, wedge-shaped steel blade with a broad cutting edge, flat poll, and painted red with a black edge; no beard or decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the head fitted onto the end of the wooden handle.
